title: Glasses/Contact Lenses - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Glasses/Contact Lenses 8 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical services for individuals without access to health care. Volunteer medical professionals offer routine preventative and non-emergency medical care. For chronic conditions such as hypertension, diabetes, asthma, and heart disease, care is provided in addition to education and equipment for self-care. Eye exams and glasses are also available. More specialized services that cannot be provided on-site are referred to a network of specialty physicians in the region. 19600 Molalla Avenue Clairmont Hall Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: -Age 18 and older with income -400% of the federal poverty guidelines for the previous 3 months -No health insurance or access to health care. -Gap insurance/medical care needed temporarily, underinsured (cannot afford care for chronic conditions under current health care plan) Hours: -Tuesday-Thursday 1pm-4pm (some Thursday evening appointments available) -Vision care appointments available on Tuesdays Email (503) 722-4400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS VISION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a vision clinic twice per year. Services may include vision exams, screenings, and glasses. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: Uninsured adults age 18 and older Hours: By appointment Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ILLINOIS VALLEY LIONS CLUB GLASSES AND HEARING AIDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eye glasses and hearing aids. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 592-4135 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JEFFERSON LIONS CLUB VISION AND HEARING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eye exams and glasses. Also provides referrals for eye surgery and hearing aids. 107 Main Street Jefferson, OR 97352 Eligibility: Low-income households, uninsured and underinsured people Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 339-5069 Get Directions More Details NEW EYES NEW EYES EYEGLASSES E-VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a basic pair of eyeglasses with single or lined bifocal lenses through an e-voucher program. Does not pay for eye exams. Approved applicants must order their glasses through New Eyes' online eyeglasses dispensary. Eligibility: -Low income individuals who reside in a household with a monthly income below 250% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Have a had a recent eye exam (within the last 24 months) with a pupillary distance measurement Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON LIONS SIGHT AND HEARING FOUNDATION SIGHT AND HEARING HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals to local Lions Clubs, which assist people in need of eye exams, eyeglasses, hearing exams, and hearing aids. Assistance depends on eligibility and funds available at each local club. No assistance with regular contact lenses for vision correction. 1010 NW 22nd Avenue Suite 144 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Individuals who have a gross household income at or below 200% of FPL and have exhausted all other resources to pay for treatement. Individual Lions Clubs may have other specific eligibility requirements. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Closed holidays. Email (503) 413-7399 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers limited emergency assistance with electric and water bills. Provides vouchers for clothing, household items, and furniture at the St. Vincent de Paul thrift store, and a food pantry is also available. Limited assistance for eyeglasses and bus passes for work or medical appointments only. Financial assistance is available once every 18 months. 435 SE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Must have a shut off notice for utility assistance (12 or 5 day) All other services: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry and Utilities: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Thrift store: Monday-Friday 9am–5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Email (503) 472-6216 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ZENNI OPTICAL EYEGLASS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an online store with low-cost glasses and sunglasses. Offers bifocals, progressive lenses, reading glasses, and glasses for astigmatism Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: 7 days per week 5am-9pm Chat and website: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 211-2105 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLACKAMAS FREE CLINIC JEFFERSON LIONS CLUB VISION AND HEARING PROGRAM OREGON LIONS SIGHT AND HEARING FOUNDATION SIGHT AND HEARING HELP ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF MCMINNVILLE
